patch.value:
# Agent story: security findings as pm context

**As a** maintainer running security scanners over pm-cli,
**I want** every finding preserved as an individually triageable pm issue (scanner ID as issue code, severity/rule/file tags, platform + code links),
**so that** any agent can rebuild the full security posture from the pm tracker alone — project management = context management.

Exemplar batch: pm-oz8u (Semgrep 2026-07-06, 40 findings). Changelog-excluded per agent-story convention.
As a maintainer, I want every security scanner finding tracked as an individually triageable pm issue with source links and severity, so that agents can drive security posture from pm context alone
Agent story for the security & code scanning capability epic pm-qwoy (one agent-story per capability epic convention, audit #4).

Given a scanner export (Semgrep CSV, dependabot alert, CodeQL SARIF), when it is imported, then each finding exists as a pm Issue with scanner ID, rule, severity, file#line, platform link, and triage tags, parented under a batch task on pm-qwoy; and pm search by scanner ID or rule finds it without leaving pm.
